task.title: Infrastructure Foundation Setup
task.description: Set up Kubernetes cluster with basic operators and namespaces for AlertHub platform

implementation.details:
1. Create Kubernetes cluster
2. Install cert-manager for TLS certificates
3. Create namespaces: databases, kafka, messaging, alerthub
4. Set up RBAC policies
5. Configure network policies for service isolation

decision.description: Storage class selection for persistent volumes

task.acceptance_criteria: Cluster is accessible via kubectl, all namespaces exist, cert-manager webhook responds, network policies allow expected traffic
